Bash(node -e "const pg=require\('pg'\);const p=new pg.Pool\({host:'34.67.252.154',port:5432,user:'postgres',password:process.argv[1],database:'mishpatly',ssl:{rejectUnauthorized:false}}\);p.query\(\\"INSERT INTO judgments \(title,slug,case_number,court_name,judgment_date,status,is_indexable,created_at,updated_at\) VALUES \('test','test-1','T-1','court','2026-01-01','PUBLISHED',true,NOW\(\),NOW\(\)\) RETURNING id\\"\).then\(r=>{console.log\('ID:',r.rows[0].id\);return p.query\('DELETE FROM judgments WHERE id='+r.rows[0].id\)}\).then\(\(\)=>{console.log\('OK'\);p.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.log\('ERR:'+e.message\);p.end\(\)}\)" '^D1TU]Jf|N,VpTv[')
